tender.source_title: Medium-size municipal switchgear package with cost-sensitive margin envelope

notice_text: Tender for supply of municipal switchgear package where commercial comparison, margin pressure, and cash-gap visibility are central to the internal decision.
technical_specification_text: Supply switchgear package, FAT protocol, acceptance kit, labeled spares, delivery to one depot, and commissioning-readiness package with a firm completion date.
contract_draft_text: Draft contract includes staged payment with partial holdback until final acceptance, standard penalties, and warranty obligations.
why_relevant: This scenario is optimized for TKP collection, economics clarity, and bid-readiness evidence during the controlled pilot.
participant_requirements: Confirm delivery schedule and acceptance package.
Provide full commercial quote and payment assumptions.
sample_supplier_questions: Can payment holdback be tied to staged acceptance instead of final batch only?
What spare-kit minimum is required for readiness?
Is commissioning-readiness evidence needed at shipment or at acceptance?

expected_decision_notes.operator_guidance: This scenario should showcase the value of TKP/economics/readiness workflow and produce meaningful internal cost and cash-gap artifacts.
